hero.title: One-click scientific figures from your paper content
hero.subtitle: Upload paper PDF / images, or paste text directly to generate editable scientific figure PPTX that you can further edit, add/remove content and adjust layout.

techExp.title: Technical Route & Experimental Charts
techExp.subtitle: Focus on methods and results: generate editable tech-route and experimental charts in one flow.
techExp.hintZh: 支持 PDF 与文本输入，生成技术路线图或者美观的实验数据图。
techExp.hintEn: Supports PDF and text. Generate the technical route first, then add experimental charts.

modelDrawio.title: Model Diagram · DrawIO & PPT
modelDrawio.subtitle: Generate a model diagram, then convert it to editable DrawIO or PPTX.
modelDrawio.hintZh: 流程：配置模型 → 生成图片 → 提示词微调 → 选择转 DrawIO 或 PPT。
modelDrawio.hintEn: Flow: configure → generate → prompt refine → convert to DrawIO or PPT.

upload.fileDragTitleFile: Drag PDF here or click to select
upload.fileDragTitleImage: Drag image here or click to select
upload.textLabel: Paste abstract, section content or any text you want to turn into PPT
upload.textPlaceholder: Paste the paper abstract, chapter content, or any text you want to convert to PPTX here (both Chinese and English are supported)...
upload.textTip: Recommended within 5,000 characters. For very long content, please split into multiple runs.

advanced.title: Model configuration (advanced)
advanced.apiKeyPlaceholder: API Key for calling OpenAI / compatible models

submit.hintText: If the request takes long or fails, the API provider may be unstable. Please try again later, or switch model/provider.

techRoute.pptCopyHintTitle: If download fails, copy the link below into your browser:
techRoute.templateHint: The selected template SVG will be used as the layout reference.

errors.unsupportedFile: Only PDF and common image formats are supported. Please check the file type.
errors.noFile: Please select a file or image to upload first
errors.noText: Please enter the text content to be converted to PPTX
errors.quotaUserExhausted: Insufficient points. Please buy and redeem a code first.
errors.missingApiConfig: Please configure model API URL and API Key first
errors.techRouteNoImage: Technical roadmap does not support image input
errors.expDataNoImage: Experimental data chart only supports PDF input, image is not allowed
errors.expDataFileOnly: Experimental data chart only supports PDF file input
errors.inviteInvalid: Invite code is incorrect or expired
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.serverBusy: Server is busy, please try again later.

success.techRouteGenerated: Technical roadmap generated. You can download PPT / SVG or directly preview PNG.

examples.sectionSubtitle: The following examples show the效果from PDF / images / text to editable PPTX.

cards.paperPdfToFigureDesc: Upload an English paper PDF, automatically extract background, methods, experiment design and conclusions, and generate a clear, academic-style PPTX.
cards.figureScreenshotToPptTitle: Scientific figure / schematic screenshot → editable PPTX
cards.figureScreenshotToPptDesc: Upload scientific figures or schematic screenshots, automatically recognize hierarchy and key points and layout them into an editable English PPTX.
cards.abstractTextToPptTitle: Paper abstract text → scientific figure PPTX
cards.abstractTextToPptDesc: Paste the paper abstract or chapter content to generate a PPTX outline with headings, key points and figure placeholders for later refinement.
cards.pdfToTechRouteTitle: Paper PDF → technical roadmap PPT + SVG
cards.pdfToTechRouteDesc: Based on the method section of the paper, automatically organize the technical route and module dependencies and generate clear roadmap PPTX and SVG diagrams.
cards.textToTechRouteTitle: Paper abstract text → technical roadmap PPT + SVG
cards.textToTechRouteDesc: Extract key steps and timeline from an entire technical proposal PDF and generate a technical timeline PPTX and SVG.
cards.pdfToExpDataTitle: Paper PDF → experimental data charts in PPT
cards.pdfToExpDataDesc: Extract tables and result descriptions from the experimental section of the paper and automatically generate comparison bar / line charts in PPTX.
cards.tableTextToExpDataTitle: Experimental table text → data charts in PPT
cards.tableTextToExpDataDesc: Extract metrics and baselines from textual experimental descriptions and generate presentation-ready experimental result PPTX.

cases.title: Model Architecture Cases
cases.subtitle: Examples can be converted to DrawIO for online editing
